channel.title: Knowledge-Graph on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Knowledge-Graph on Junho Lee

item.title: Scaling Multimodal RAG with Dual-Graph Data Alignment
item.description: RAG-Anything utilizes a dual-graph structure to bridge the gap between text and visual data, improving retrieval accuracy for complex tables and charts.

item.title: Legal Data Gets a Brain: The Synergy of korean-law-mcp and DataNexus
item.description: korean-law-mcp streamlines legal data access while DataNexus’s knowledge-graph-based ontology layer explicitly maps complex statutory connections, significantly enhancing AI’s ability to interpret law accurately.
